title: Battery Backup vs Generator
description: Batteries and generators both provide backup power, but they differ in fuel, maintenance, noise, and solar integration.
winnerSummary: Batteries are quiet and pair well with solar; generators can run longer if fuel is available.
bestForA: Homeowners wanting clean, quiet backup and solar integration.
bestForB: Homeowners needing extended backup for large loads.
costConsiderations: Compare installed cost, fuel, maintenance, runtime, transfer equipment, and critical load needs.

faqs.question: Can batteries replace generators?
faqs.answer: Sometimes for essential loads, but extended whole-home backup may still need a generator or multiple batteries.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar financing resources
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau financing education
EnergySage solar equipment and financing education
